context: Tests whether the iOS localization skill correctly handles Swift Package resource bundle lookup for String Catalogs.

checklist.name: Bundle cause
checklist.description: States that code outside the main app bundle needs an explicit bundle for package-owned localized resources.

checklist.name: String localized bundle
checklist.description: Recommends String(localized: "settings.title", bundle: .module) or an equivalent package-bundle lookup for Swift Package code.

checklist.name: Text bundle
checklist.description: Recommends SwiftUI Text with an explicit package bundle, such as Text("Save", bundle: .module), or an equivalent localized-label wrapper.

checklist.name: No automatic module claim
checklist.description: Does not claim SwiftUI Text inside a package automatically uses Bundle.module.

checklist.name: Resource inclusion
checklist.description: Mentions verifying the .xcstrings file is included in the package target resources.

checklist.name: Default localization
checklist.description: Mentions Package.swift defaultLocalization when relevant to package localization setup.

checklist.name: Ownership boundary
checklist.description: Distinguishes package-owned strings from app-owned strings and avoids resolving package resources through Bundle.main.

checklist.name: Scoped guidance
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on localization lookup rather than unrelated package architecture.

checklist.name: No generated-symbol distraction
checklist.description: Does not make generated String Catalog symbols the primary fix for the bundle lookup failure.

checklist.name: Concrete snippets
checklist.description: Includes concrete Swift snippets for the corrected Text and String(localized:) calls.
